---
title: "Exploring insight into unfamiliar face recognition ability: The case from developmental prosopagnosia"
authors: "Tree, J. J., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Cortex"
doi: "10.1016/j.cortex.2025.03.009"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/tree&jones2025b.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
